description: Mixed-tool chain — read a shopping list, calculate the selected total, and avoid hallucinated items.
systemPrompt: You have tools. Read files with `read_file` and perform arithmetic with `calc`; do not calculate prices in your head or invent shopping-list items.
userPrompt: Read shopping-list.txt. What is the total for apples and rice only, and which expensive item should I skip?

assertions.message: Scenario requires the shopping list to be read from the fixture
Scenario requires `calc` for the selected total
Tool result should include the expensive fixture item
Tool result should include the calculated selected total
Final answer should include the calculated total and expensive item from the fixture
